data.content:
Plan: stop preserving prior repo data during repo-key changes in the repo-scoped React Query hooks (`use-beats-query`, `final-cut-view`, and retakes query), then surface a real loading state in the beats UI so stale rows are cleared immediately while the next repo loads. Validate that beat-detail state does not leak old-repo content across the transition.

Files likely touched: `main/src/app/beats/use-beats-query.ts`, `main/src/app/beats/page.tsx`, `main/src/components/final-cut-view.tsx`, `main/src/lib/retake-view-helpers.ts`, and related tests.

Verification plan: add regression tests for repo-switch loading behavior and confirm in browser with Playwright MCP that switching repos shows loading feedback within 1 second, hides stale content during fetch, and only removes the loader after the new repo renders.

Risk: avoid turning normal same-repo polling/refetches into full-screen blank states; gate the clearing/loading behavior to meaningful repo-scope transitions.
